smoke.detail: No smoke: authentic SMARTCyp 3.0 Python/RDKit source could not be installed on the box (unobtainable), so there is nothing to run. No pixi.lock solved; no fabricated fallback.

note: BLOCKED: SMARTCyp 3.0 Python source unobtainable - smartcyp.sund.ku.dk returns HTTP 503 on all paths (confirmed from box + independent net), no PyPI package, no authoritative public source repo. Only alternatives are the forbidden legacy Java line (MDStudio_SMARTCyp ships smartcyp-2.4.2.jar; cdk/smartcyp) or third-party re-implementations with hand-invented reactivity energies. Did not fall back to legacy Java or a fake per the no-fabricate rule (CLAUDE.md §4/§5). Endpoint marker + adapter design + exact block reason recorded.
